zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Beaujeu於大約1230年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧時，她的父親Humbert V de Beaujeu35歲，母親Marguerite de Bâgé31歲。她於1244年與Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年1月8日在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Beaujeu于大约1230年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧时，她的父亲Humbert V de Beaujeu35岁，母亲Marguerite de Bâgé31岁。她于1244年与Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年1月8日在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Beaujeu was born about 1230, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Humbert V de Beaujeu, was 35 and her mother, Marguerite de Bâgé, was 31. She married Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais in 1244. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 January 1297, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Beaujeu est née environ 1230, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Humbert V de Beaujeu, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bâgé, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1297, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Beaujeu um 1230 in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humbert V de Beaujeu 35 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Bâgé 31. Sie hat 1244 Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1297 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Beaujeu è nata il circa 1230 nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Humbert V de Beaujeu, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Bâgé, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais nel 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1297, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaujeuが約1230年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウで生まれた時，父Humbert V de Beaujeuは35歳，母Marguerite de Bâgéは31歳であった。1244年にSimon II de Semur-en-Brionnaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年1月8日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Beaujeu(이)가 대략 1230년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humbert V de Beaujeu(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Bâgé(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1244년 Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 1월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Beaujeu nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Humbert V de Beaujeu, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bâgé, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais em 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1297, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Beaujeu родилась около 1230 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Humbert V de Beaujeu было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bâgé, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais в 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 января 1297 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Beaujeu nació aproximadamente 1230, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Humbert V de Beaujeu, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bâgé, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais en 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de enero de 1297, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
